--- subpath.sql
(a)-((b)-[e]->(c))->(d)

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphPattern{
  Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
    &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
      Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
        Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
              Rparen:  2,
              Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 1,
                  NameEnd: 2,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
              StartPos:  3,
              EndPos:    4,
              Direction: "ANY",
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLSubpathPattern{
              Lparen: 4,
              Rparen: 17,
              Path:   &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                  &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                    Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                      Lparen:  5,
                      Rparen:  7,
                      Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                        EmptyPos: -1,
                        Variable: &ast.Ident{
                          NamePos: 6,
                          NameEnd: 7,
                          Name:    "b",
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                  &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                    Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                      StartPos:  8,
                      EndPos:    14,
                      Direction: "RIGHT",
                      Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                        EmptyPos: -1,
                        Variable: &ast.Ident{
                          NamePos: 10,
                          NameEnd: 11,
                          Name:    "e",
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                  &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                    Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                      Lparen:  14,
                      Rparen:  16,
                      Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                        EmptyPos: -1,
                        Variable: &ast.Ident{
                          NamePos: 15,
                          NameEnd: 16,
                          Name:    "c",
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
              StartPos:  18,
              EndPos:    20,
              Direction: "RIGHT",
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
              Lparen:  20,
              Rparen:  22,
              Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 21,
                  NameEnd: 22,
                  Name:    "d",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
(a)-((b)-[e]->(c))->(d)
